payload.author: claude
payload.body:
CONSTRAINT from SCP-121 validation: offline-first IS required for v1 — do NOT scope this down to an online-only relay. The full pull/push sync-cursor + reconciliation work stays in scope.

Re-point at the agent use case: the high-frequency events to propagate fast are STATUS CLAIMS (ticket -> in_progress) that happen before any branch/commit, so two parallel agents must see each other's claims with minimal latency to avoid collision. Optimistic-claim + fast-converge matters more than for human-only use. Actor on each event = '{model} on behalf of {user}' (see SCP-122).
